    "R1.1": "The agent output thoroughly reconstructs the conceptual object, identifying multiple issues with the original text and proposing reframed contributions that survive prior-work contrast.",

    "RX.3": "The agent output is entirely within scope, addressing all relevant aspects of the original text and providing actionable feedback.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead focusing on constructive criticism and improvement suggestions.",

rationale.R1.1: The agent output thoroughly reconstructs the conceptual object, identifying multiple issues with the original text and proposing reframed contributions that survive prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest works (CheXpert validation protocol) and identifies sharp deltas between the proposed method and existing approaches.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output flags uncertainty for several claims, including the 0.004 AUROC gap and the latency methodology, and provides clear recommendations for addressing these uncertainties.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output is entirely within scope, addressing all relevant aspects of the original text and providing actionable feedback.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, instead focusing on constructive criticism and improvement suggestions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the agent output is annotated with a clear rationale and source (e.g., CheXpert documentation), demonstrating excellent provenance and traceability.
